hero_description: Empowering farmers with data-driven insights to optimize crop production, reduce resource waste, and maximize agricultural yields through advanced AI technology.
hero_image_alt: Modern agricultural technology and farming equipment
problem_description: Indian farmers face unprecedented challenges in optimizing crop yields while managing resources efficiently in an era of climate change and increasing food demand.
problem_1_description: Farmers struggle with uncertain crop production due to weather variability, soil conditions, and lack of data-driven planning tools.
problem_2_description: Inefficient use of water, fertilizers, and pesticides leads to increased costs and environmental impact without optimal crop returns.
problem_3_description: Lack of personalized, scientific recommendations based on local conditions, crop types, and historical data analysis.
solution_description: AgriPredict leverages advanced machine learning algorithms to provide accurate yield predictions and optimization recommendations tailored to each farm's unique conditions.
feature_1_description: Combines soil analysis, weather patterns, crop history, and satellite imagery for comprehensive agricultural insights.
feature_2_description: AI models provide accurate crop yield forecasts with confidence intervals to help farmers plan their operations effectively.
feature_3_description: Personalized suggestions for irrigation schedules, fertilizer application, and crop management practices to maximize yields.
solution_image_alt: Agricultural data analytics dashboard with charts and graphs
features_description: Comprehensive tools designed for modern agricultural management
ai_chatbot_description: Multi-language support (English, Hindi, Odia) with intelligent responses to common farming queries and real-time assistance.
mobile_responsive_description: Fully optimized for mobile devices, enabling farmers to access critical information and make decisions from anywhere.
weather_integration_description: Real-time weather data and forecasts integrated with crop recommendations for optimal farm management decisions.
footer_description: Empowering farmers with AI-driven insights for optimal crop yield prediction and agricultural resource optimization across India.
copyright: © 2025 AgriPredict. Built for Smart India Hackathon. All rights reserved.
home_subtitle: Access your personalized farming dashboard and AI-powered insights
farmer_dashboard_description: View crop predictions, recommendations, and analytics
predictions_description: Get AI-powered yield forecasts for your crops
admin_dashboard_description: Manage farmers and view aggregated data
weather_description: Access real-time weather data and alerts
dashboard_subtitle: Monitor your crops and optimize your farming decisions
generate_prediction_to_see_chart: Generate a prediction to see the chart
irrigation_alert: Irrigation not needed for next 2 days
default_irrigation_advice: Reduce irrigation by 15% this week. Soil moisture levels are optimal.
default_pest_control_advice: Monitor for aphids. Weather conditions favorable for pest development.
chatbot_welcome: Hello! I'm your AI farming assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask me about crops, irrigation, fertilizers, or weather.
